Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Dude... I think that chick's checking me out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Oh yeah, dude. She's definitely checking me out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I have this strange feeling that someone's watching me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Maybe it's just my imagination.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Dude, I'm so used to her stalking me now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Like, I know she's always there, but I don't even notice her anymore.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Dude, that girl keeps following me around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}But she's actually pretty cute, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}The first thing I do when I get to school is look for her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Then, when I finally find her, I get butterflies in my stomach...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}What should I do, what should I do...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Argh! I can't take this anymore![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I'm going to ask her out![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I know she'll say yes! I mean, she was the one following me around in the first place![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I gotta start thinking up plans for our date like now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Well, I asked her out, dude...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And she totally rejected me! She said she didn't like me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Dammit! I can't believe this... She was the one following me around![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Well, I'll show her! Tonight, I'm gonna...![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I'm gonna cry myself to sleep...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Do you see that girl over there? I think she's following me around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Hmm... How should I deal with this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}You know that chick back there who's been following me?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I don't know what to do with her... So I'll just leave her hanging.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Damn, she's so persistent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}She must have some kind of iron will to follow me around this much.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}She'd make a great detective.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Sometimes, that girl over there who's stalking me loses my trail.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I don't know why, but I get anxious when that happens.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Wait a sec... Am I obsessed with her, too...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Hey, man, what should I do...? Every time I look at her, she seems prettier.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}*sigh* I'll have to be happy with just looking at her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I don't know why, man, but I think I'm starting to fall for her...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}What should I do? I can't just keep doing nothing![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Maybe I should go ahead and talk to her, y'know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Dude, did you see that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}She helped that brat who fell and started crying! She actually made him stop that damn bawling![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Damn... She's one nice girl...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Dude, did you see that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}She gave her seat to some old fart, man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Dude, what's going on? That girl who's been following me all this time...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I was gonna talk to her, but she stopped following me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}I've been watching her to try to figure out why, but I don't know... Something seems off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Dude, did you see that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}She helped some mangy cat that those brats were picking on![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Then she fed it some real high-class, gourmet cat food![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}It's just a stray cat. Why's she making such a fuss over it...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Damn! I missed my chance to talk to her.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}All I seem to do these days is follow her around...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}What should I do?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}Isn't she awesome?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 300}M-Maybe I'll just keep checking her out a little while longer...[n]{f 1 1}
